title: AI Filmmaking Tutorial: Character Consistency Fixed!
summary: ImagineArt Film Studio is a browser-based AI filmmaking platform that addresses character consistency in AI-generated video by locking character appearance across scenes. It includes storyboarding, multi-shot generation with camera presets, scene extension, and built-in timeline editing for complete short film production without external software.
